titleStmt.title: SII 25.117: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 117. (A.R. No. 117 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the kitchen in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartin Vikrama Pāṇḍya (Māṟavarmaṉ Vikrama-Pāṇḍya) Year 12: 1281-82 A.D.

summary.p: This epigraph may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 13th Century.

It records the gift of money (dravyam) deposited into the treasury of the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār by Villiuḍaiyanāchchi alias Māṉatilatavalli, a dēvaraḍiyāḷ of Rājēndram for the daily food-offerings to the deity Tirunāvukkaraśudēvar set up by her in the temple of Kayilāsamuḍaiya-nāyanār at Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu.
The śrībhaṇḍāram has to supply 2 nāḻi of rice daily for the said purpose. This was caused to be engraved on stone by the Śrīmahēśvarasabhai.

The place Rājēndram is mentioned elsewhere in a record of the 7th year of the reign of Māṟavarmaṉ Vikrama-pāṇḍya with the praśasti, Tirumagaḷ Jayamagaḷ, etc. and of accession date 1269-70 A.D. This record refers to him as seated on his throne called Maḻalaiyadaraiyaṉ in his palace at Rājēndram, east of Rāśiṅgaṉkuḷam. Also it is stated to be the place of Kaṇḍiyadēvar. (vide A.R.Ep., 1924, part II, p. 109). On account of the palaeography and the mention of the palace. Rājēndram in our record, the king may be identified with Māṟavarmaṉ Vikramapāṇḍya of acc. 1269 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakravarttikaḷ śrī vikrama pāṇṭiya devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2āvatu keraḷaciṅkavaḷa nāṭ
ṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr śrī kayilāsamuṭaiya nāyanārkku Irājendrattu
tevaraṭiyāḷ villi Uṭaiya nācciyāṉa māṉa tilativalli Eḻuntaruḷuvitta
tirunāvukkaracu devaṟku Amutupaṭikku veṇṭu ndravyam Ivaḷ tiruttaḷi
yāṇṭa nāyanār śrīpaṇṭārattile Oṭikkiṉamaiyil I śrīpaṇṭāratte ..
nittamiru nāḻi Arici candrādityavaṟ celvatāka kalveṭṭi kuṭittom śrīmāheśvara sabhayom
Itu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 25.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
